excluded: acceptance of credit attestation or exact live-run approval
creation of a runnable live-submit command
a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
supported: cost-constrained comparison of full, reduced-shot, scout, and strong-lane hardware scopes
explicit distinction between claim-capable and scouting-only scope reductions
pre-attestation recommendation to avoid asking the user to approve a likely-over-budget full run

next_gate: Preregister the selected reduced-scope interpretation boundary before asking for credit attestation. Recommended default is all_lanes_half_shots_2048; use scout_512 only for operational smoke testing.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
